summary: Spike on Feb 16 to 100 caused by Robert Duvall's death - he played consigliere Tom Hagen in The Godfather
content: Robert Duvall died on Feb 16, 2026 aged 95. He was famous for playing Tom Hagen, the consigliere in The Godfather. This caused search interest in "consigliere" to spike from ~10 to 100 on Feb 16, with Feb 17 still at 91. Related queries confirm: top queries are "duvall", "robert duvall", "godfather consigliere". This is a classic celebrity death news spike.
